headline: Led CBA Insurance divestment to Hollard. Integrated Suncorp/Promina intermediated personal lines post-merger.
evidence: Led CBA Insurance through divestment to Hollard: joint strategy, funded roadmap, and separation of a $1bn+ portfolio deeply integrated into the Group. Delivered the Suncorp/Promina post-merger integration for intermediated personal lines, consolidating platforms and teams across two legacy businesses. Ran six-month competitive process at Westpac, shortlisting six insurers to two; Allianz selected as strategic alliance partner with portfolio transfer.
